productDisplayName: Lotto Men's Calcetto White Red Shoe
description: Replete with pointed lugs and a durable upper body, the lotto Street shoes keep your feet firmly on the ground. Stylish to look at and great to wear, these shoes team perfectly with jeans and tees for a cool casual look off the ground.Upper Synthetic and mesh upper with stitch detailing for lightweight durability Suede padding along the toe box that acts as an abrasion resistant guard Mesh lining on the collar and below the synthetic tongue for durability Knitted lace for extended durability and snug Fit Midsole Soft, cushy footbed for all day in-step comfort EVA injected midsole for lightweight comfort and enhanced shock absorption Outsole Conical rubber lugs on the outsole for great grip on hard surfaces shoe careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
